general.descriptionTextModule: Audit and reporting tools for Shopware stores

dashboard.loadError: The audit dashboard could not be loaded.
dashboard.runScanError: The scan could not be completed.
dashboard.runScanSuccess: Scan completed and dashboard updated successfully.
dashboard.healthyHeadline: Great job — no critical issues need immediate attention.
dashboard.headlineOutOfStock: {count} products are out of stock and need immediate attention.
dashboard.headlineMissingPrice: {count} products are missing prices and should be fixed first.
dashboard.headlineMissingDescription: {count} products are missing descriptions and should be improved.
dashboard.headlineMissingMetaTitle: {count} products are missing SEO meta titles.
dashboard.topSellingProductsInfo: Products with the highest number of sales based on recent order data.
dashboard.lowStockProductsInfo: Best-selling products that currently have low inventory and may need restocking soon.
dashboard.salesInsightsSubtitle: Last 30 days · compared with the previous 30 days
dashboard.salesInsightsInfo: Revenue and order KPIs for the last 30 days, compared with the previous 30-day period.

dashboardInsights.latestSummaryText: The latest scan reviewed {scannedProducts} products, produced {totalFindings} grouped findings, and generated {taskCount} tasks.

dashboardImpact.missingDescription: May reduce product conversion and content quality.
dashboardImpact.missingCoverImage: Weak visual presentation can reduce customer interest.
dashboardImpact.inactiveProducts: These products are hidden and cannot generate sales.
dashboardImpact.outOfStockProducts: Out-of-stock products create direct revenue loss risk.
dashboardImpact.missingMetaTitle: Missing SEO meta titles can reduce search visibility.
dashboardImpact.missingCategory: Products may be harder for customers to discover.
dashboardImpact.missingManufacturer: Incomplete product data can reduce trust and filter quality.
dashboardImpact.missingPrice: Products without price cannot be purchased properly.
dashboardImpact.missingTranslation: Customers may see fallback language or incomplete content.
dashboardImpact.productMissingMetaDescription: May reduce search click-through rate and SEO quality.
dashboardImpact.productWeakTitle: Weak titles can reduce discoverability and product clarity.
dashboardImpact.productShortDescription: Short descriptions may reduce trust and conversion.
dashboardImpact.categoryMissingMetaTitle: Missing category SEO meta titles can weaken category visibility.
dashboardImpact.categoryMissingMetaDescription: Missing category meta descriptions may reduce SEO click-through rate.
dashboardImpact.categoryMissingDescription: Thin category content may weaken SEO and user guidance.

tasks.loadError: The tasks page could not be loaded.

reports.loadError: The reports page could not be loaded.
